'''sanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:palaeohistologically|palaeohistologically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:palaeohistologically|palaeohistologically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sanate|sanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sanatesher|sanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sanatesherĂ«m|sanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sanatero|sanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sanateshĂ«|sanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sanateshĂ«m|sanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisanatero|gokisanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisanateshĂ«|gokisanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisanateshĂ«m|gokisanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosanankerom|gosanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosanankeshĂ«|gosanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosanankeshĂ«m|gosanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosanankeya|gosanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sanaterom|sanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sanatemu|sanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sanateya|sanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisanaterom|gokisanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisanatemu|gokisanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisanateya|gokisanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sananate|sananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sananatesher|sananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sananatesherĂ«m|sananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sananatero|sananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sananateshĂ«|sananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sananateshĂ«m|sananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisananatero|gokisananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisananateshĂ«|gokisananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisananateshĂ«m|gokisananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosananankerom|gosananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosananankeshĂ«|gosananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosananankeshĂ«m|gosananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosananankeya|gosananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sananaterom|sananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sananatemu|sananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sananateya|sananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisananaterom|gokisananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisananatemu|gokisananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisananateya|gokisananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠnĂŠte|sĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠnĂŠtesher|sĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠnĂŠtero|sĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠnĂŠtero|gokisĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠnĂŠterom|sĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠnĂŠtemu|sĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠnĂŠteya|sĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠnĂŠterom|gokisĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠnĂŠteya|gokisĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safnafte|safnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safnaftesher|safnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safnaftesherĂ«m|safnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safnaftero|safnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safnafteshĂ«|safnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safnafteshĂ«m|safnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafnaftero|gokisafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafnafteshĂ«|gokisafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafnafteshĂ«m|gokisafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafnafnkerom|gosafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafnafnkeshĂ«|gosafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafnafnkeshĂ«m|gosafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafnafnkeya|gosafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safnafterom|safnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safnaftemu|safnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safnafteya|safnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafnafterom|gokisafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafnaftemu|gokisafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafnafteya|gokisafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
